page_metadata.biotools__summary: CryProcessor is a python-written tool for searching and extracting Cry toxins from illumina sequence data or from the protein fasta files. It includes several parts: an hmm-based scanning for potential Cry toxins, obtaining information about the domains, extracting Cry toxins with 3 domains only and comparing found toxins with Bt nomenclature.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CryProcessor is a python-written tool for searching and extracting Cry toxins from illumina sequence data or from the protein fasta files.
